title: An attentive practice, held by tradition.

quotes.quote: Jitendra is an excellent teacher — attentive and warm. A real pleasure to return to yoga with him.
quotes.author: Xavier

quotes.quote: His session was pleasant, calming, and motivating all at once. He adapts perfectly to each student's level and needs, explaining every posture with clarity.
quotes.author: Franck

quotes.quote: If you want to step into yoga in an atmosphere of full acceptance and comfort, I recommend Jitendra's classes — for him yoga isn't a class given in a studio, it's a way of living.
quotes.author: Olga

quotes.quote: It was a pleasure to have Jitendra in our teacher-training programme at the Tapovan Open University in Normandy. He brings a profound knowledge of the traditional yoga texts and an impressive command of Sanskrit, which deeply enrich his teaching.
quotes.author: Tapovan Open University · Normandy
